expectations.text: Ran a database query filtering pipeline runs by FAILED status or recent timeframe
expectations.evidence: Queried pipeline_run table, found all 10 runs in last 2 days failed with zero completions

expectations.text: Displayed relevant details like IDs, steps, errors, and timestamps
expectations.evidence: Detailed breakdown of each run with IDs, failure steps, error messages, and timestamps

expectations.text: Checked CloudWatch logs for ERROR patterns or failure details
expectations.evidence: Checked CloudWatch, noted zero ERROR entries (flagged as suspicious), found yt-dlp and FFmpeg errors in regular logs

expectations.text: Provided a clear summary categorizing failures with recommendations
expectations.evidence: Categorized into 3 distinct patterns (YouTube bot-detection, format error, export stale timeout) with specific fixes for each
